message:
Fix BTree cursor seek successor positioning and interior page insertion

Fix leaf EOF handling: when target exceeds last key, look up tree for
first ancestor with available successor instead of always flagging EOF.
Fix interior page insertion: distinguish exact-match (descend right
child) from successor-match (descend left child rightmost leaf) for
correct insert positioning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
